improvementsFromRound7.description: Automation Tier combobox now visible and interactable in Autopilot Settings. Shows 3 options (Supervised/Semi-Auto/Full Auto). Unit tests verify tier enforcement correctly sets approvalMode based on automation tier. Runs show automation tier metadata.

Delivery runs now show workspace and branch metadata in UI. Port field shows '—' for pending runs (expected - no port leased yet). Workspace configuration fields (workspaceId, repoUrl) visible in AutopilotSettings. Unit tests verify workspace and port metadata storage.

Pause Autopilot button visible in Autopilot Settings when autopilot enabled. Budget tab exists at project level. Unit tests verify budget pause enforcement and check-budget-and-pause-if-needed correctly handles budget cap scenarios.

progressFromPriorRounds: Round 6 found VAL-AUTOPILOT-031, 032, and 033 blocked because: (1) runs were pending without tier enforcement visible, (2) port showed '—' without actual allocation, (3) budget depletion scenario impractical to test. Round 8 re-testing after advanced-execution and closed-loop-operations commits (75f41c1e, 2364db05) shows: automation tier combobox is visible with 3 options; delivery runs show workspace/branch metadata; Pause Autopilot button and Budget tab exist; unit tests pass for tier enforcement (approvalMode based on tier), workspace/port metadata storage, and budget pause enforcement. All 17 delivery-control assertions now passed.
